title: Saudian Midnight Crumble
description: A delicious dessert featuring a saudian-inspired midnight filling topped with a crumbly herb-infused crust.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry crust and place in a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix the midnight filling and crumble topping.
Pour the midnight filling mixture over the pastry crust.
Sprinkle the crumble topping evenly over the filling.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Drizzle with caramel sauce, if desired.
